economic_notes: Nation has 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership and 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Ltd. (both equity method). Also has 1075124 B.C. Ltd. and Nuchatlaht First Nation Community Logging Corporation (fully consolidated). Fisheries licence lease and sport fishing charter revenues indicate resource-based economic activities.
notes: Consolidation includes Nuchatlaht First Nation government administration, Social Housing Program, Trust Fund, Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership, Hayu Fishing Ltd., 1075124 B.C. Ltd., and Nuchatlaht First Nation Community Logging Corporation. Hayu Fishing LP and Hayu Fishing Ltd. use modified equity method (25% interest each). 1075124 B.C. Ltd. and Community Logging Corporation use full consolidation. Total government transfers estimated as Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council operating ($1,408,717) + Province of BC ($616,859) + DFO ($85,655) + CMHC subsidies ($4,196) + Union of BC Municipalities ($99,210) = $2,214,637 but Union of BC Municipalities may not be a government transfer; adjusted to exclude UBCMun: $1,595,427. Treaty loan of $869,976 was forgiven in prior year 2020 as a one-time item. Expense breakdown not available by program beyond Operating Fund ($1,809,812) and Social Housing Fund ($20,251). No remuneration schedule visible in provided pages.
